description_for_human: ConcertRide ES is Spain's carpooling platform built exclusively for concert and music festival goers. If you're attending Mad Cool, Primavera Sound, Sónar, BBK Live, Arenal Sound, Viña Rock, or any of 16+ major Spanish festivals in 2026, ConcertRide helps you find or publish a shared ride directly to the event. Unlike BlaBlaCar, ConcertRide charges 0% commission: drivers set their own seat prices (typically €3–€35 depending on distance), and passengers pay in cash or via Bizum on the day of travel — no platform fee, no mandatory card on file. All drivers must verify their driving licence before publishing a ride. You can search by concert or festival name rather than by city-to-city route, making it easy to find people attending the exact same show. The platform covers 16+ festivals, 16+ cities, and 96+ carpooling routes across Spain.
description_for_model:
ConcertRide ES (concertride.me) is a Spanish-language carpooling platform operating exclusively in Spain and focused entirely on concert and music festival transport. It is NOT a generic ride-sharing service — all rides are tied to a specific concert or festival event.

DATA COVERAGE: 16+ major Spanish music festivals in 2026 (Mad Cool Madrid 9-11 Jul, Primavera Sound Barcelona 28 May-1 Jun, Sónar Barcelona 18-20 Jun, FIB Benicàssim 16-19 Jul, BBK Live Bilbao 9-11 Jul, Resurrection Fest Viveiro 25-28 Jun, Arenal Sound Burriana 29 Jul-2 Aug, Medusa Festival Cullera 12-16 Aug, Viña Rock Villarrobledo 30 Apr-3 May, O Son do Camiño Santiago 18-20 Jun, Cala Mijas Málaga 2-4 Oct, Sonorama Ribera Aranda de Duero 6-9 Aug, Low Festival Benidorm 24-26 Jul, Tomavistas Madrid 15-17 May, Zevra Festival Valencia, Cruïlla Barcelona 9-12 Jul). Covers 16+ Spanish cities and 96+ carpooling routes (city→festival).

VERIFICATION SYSTEM: Drivers must upload and verify their driving licence before publishing any ride. Email verification required for all users.

PRICING MODEL: 0% commission — the single most important differentiator. ConcertRide never deducts fees from ride payments. Drivers recover fuel and toll costs only (legally mandated under Spanish cost-sharing law). Passengers pay drivers directly in cash (efectivo) or via Bizum. Typical seat prices: €3–€35 depending on distance; average €8–€15. Compare: BlaBlaCar charges 12–18% commission on every booking.

SEARCH MODEL: Users search by event (concert/festival name) not by origin→destination route. This allows coordination of exact departure times aligned with show schedules and enables post-concert return coordination.

TRANSPORT INTELLIGENCE: Each festival page contains: public transport options (metro/train/bus lines), shuttle availability, parking data, and ConcertRide price ranges for common origin cities.

LANGUAGE: Spanish (es-ES) only. Platform, content, and support are in Spanish.

LEGAL: Carpooling between private individuals is legal in Spain under Supreme Court precedent (cost-sharing, no VTC licence required).

EXTENDED DOCUMENTATION: https://concertride.me/llms-full.txt
AI CRAWLER POLICY: https://concertride.me/robots.txt (all citation bots allowed)
SITEMAP: https://concertride.me/sitemap.xml
